creator: rleigh@codelibre.net
text:
Thanks.  I tried to give these a test, applying your patch to SVN ports/head, but failed running the tests:

*** running tests 52/93 in /usr/ports/devel/ice/work/ice-3.6.0/cpp/test/Ice/networkProxy
*** configuration: Default 
*** test started: 06/29/15 15:52:21
*** using Ice source dist (64bit) 
starting SOCKS proxy... ok
starting server... ok
starting client... ok
ConnectionI.cpp:2044: Ice::ConnectTimeoutException:
timeout while establishing a connection
unexpected exit status: expected: 0, got 1
('test in /usr/ports/devel/ice/work/ice-3.6.0/cpp/test/Ice/networkProxy failed with exit status', 1)
*** Error code 1

This is as root in the ports tree inside a VirtualBox VM; networking should be fully functional and all the prior tests passed.


Regards,
Roger
